subject: Re: halli hallo
body:
you are welcome anytime

--- Manuela Stötter <mstoetter@hotmail.com> wrote:

> Hey Jeffrey,
> 
> I haven't heard from you since a while....I sent you
> some e-mails with 
> pictures of me traveling but I guess you never
> received them...
> 
> What about if I come to say HI to you sometimes in
> the office?
> I have many things to tell you about what is
> happening in my life...
> You will be pround of me....I learned a lot from
> you!
> 
> tell me when I can com

> kisses kisses
> 
> manu

body_html:
you are welcome anytime

--- Manuela Stötter mstoetter@hotmail.com wrote:

Hey Jeffrey,

I haven't heard from you since a while....I sent you
some e-mails with
pictures of me traveling but I guess you never
received them...

What about if I come to say HI to you sometimes in
the office?
I have many things to tell you about what is
happening in my life...
You will be pround of me....I learned a lot from
you!

tell me when I can com

kisses kisses

manu
